rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To Petition To Obtain Personal Property
rulings.Rulings: On February 26, 2019, Petitioner filed Petition to Obtain Possession of Real and Personal Property Under Probate Code sections 850, 859. On April 3, 2019, Respondent Chicago Title Company filed a demurrer to the Petition, with a May 9, 2019 hearing date. On April 24, 2019, Petitioner filed and served an amended Petition to Obtain Possession of Real and Personal Property Under Probate Code sections 850, 859, within the time period for filing an opposition to the demurrer, per CCP section 472. The pending demurrer is therefor not responsive to the current amended Petition. Respondent Chicago Title Company's demurrer is off calendar as moot. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, May 8, 2019.
